question: Will the weekly average of the amount of money loaned as part of the Bank Term Funding Program have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/H41RESPPALDKXAWNWW once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-02-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-01-22) was 0.000. (The latest value released in Assets: Liquidity and Credit Facilities: Loans: Bank Term Funding Program, Net: Week Average from the release H.4.1 Factors Affecting Reserve Balances.)
